# BP-79 negative: locally owned cancellation is deferred in the same function
lang: go
file: BP-79-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"time"
)

// Request derives a context and releases its local cancellation function.
func Request(parent context.Context) context.Context {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(parent, time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return ctx
}
